name: Quince & Champagne Paste
description: MAGGIE BEER QUINCE & CHAMPAGNE PASTE 100G
long_description:
Create the most delicious platter by pairing your favourite cheeses with Maggie Beer's Quince & Champagne Paste.

This fruit paste combines the beautiful flavour of Australian quince, delicate notes of Champagne and crisp acidity from Australian Seville oranges.

It makes for the perfect accompaniment to a luscious Triple Cream Brie or Camembert.

Made with 100% Australian quinces, it has a distinctive flavour that's sure to impress a lover of gourmet food.

name: Crostini Crackers Parmersan & Black Pepper
description: RED ROCK DELI CROSTINI CRACKERS:PARMERSAN & BLACK PEPPER:.:115 GRAM
long_description:
Snacking Gets SeriousRed Rock Deli Parmesan & Black Pepper Biscuit Crackers take the snack game seriously by being the perfect component in the classic combo of cheese & cracker snacks. Whether you're creating a cheese platter for a dinner party, or contributing to an array of lunch snacks, this 115g platter share pack is perfect to spread around at any gathering.Dip the Way You WantIf you're looking for a dip cracker that offers more than a foundation to hold your favourite dip, look no further than Red Rock Deli crackers. The crispbread structure allows for the seasoning of parmesan and black pepper to cut through any dip you place the biscuits into, ensuring your topping's inherent taste is heightened. No platter crackers can quite compare to the quality of Red Rock Deli.Take the Initiative to Enjoy the DayTake a moment to enjoy the world around you when you sit down and open a box of Red Rock Deli biscuit crackers. Try a picnic with friends or head off solo to take a moment to yourself and your newest picnic treat. Let the world fade away and just focus on the flavours on your tongue. It'll be hard to think or do anything else when you're crunching into crackers like you've never tasted before, but we're sure you can still enjoy a day out in the sun!
  • Red Rock Deli Parmesan & Black Pepper Biscuit Crackers are the premium quality platter crackers you've been waiting for.

  • Enjoy the unique taste of creamy parmesan and freshly cracked black pepper with every bite of Red Rock Deli biscuit crackers.

  • No cheese platter is complete without these crispbread creations.

  • Picnic the best way possible by packing yourself the best biscuit crackers Red Rock Deli has to offer.
ingredients: Wheat Flour, Canola Oil, Wheat Gluten, Whey Powder (Milk), Maltodextrin, Salt, Cheese Powder (Milk), Yeast Powder, Natural Flavours (Milk), Vinegar, Black Pepper, Mineral Salt (Potassium Chloride), Parmesan Cheese Powder (Milk), Natural Colours (Paprika Extract, Curcumin), Processing Aid (Sulphites).

name: Gluten Free Seeded Crackers Herb & Garlic
description: OLINAS SIMPLY SEED CRACKERS:GARLIC & HERB:.:80 GRAM
long_description:
Olina's Bakehouse brings friends, family, and flavours together with delicious artisan crackers. Bring a touch of natural charm to any gathering with our range of seeded crackers and turn your get togethers into unforgettable moments.

Loaded with crunchy seeds and the delicious flavours of herb & garlic, Olina's Bakehouse Herb & Garlic Seeded Crackers are the perfect accompaniment to your cheese board for any entertaining or social occasion.

Share in the delicious flavour combinations with Olina's Bakehouse Artisan Crackers for long lunches, BBQ's, birthday celebrations, festive entertaining, christmas, new years, easter, spring carnival or casual get togethers with family and friends.

Or why not indulge in the delicious flavour combinations at any time of the year, accompanied by cheese, dips, cold meats, olives, pickles, fruit paste, fresh fruit and honey, or enjoy the unique texture and flavour of Olina's Bakehouse premium quality specialty Biscuits all by themselves.
  • Gluten Free

  • Delicious Seeded Crackers

  • Perfect for entertaining

name: Crostini Crackers Smoked Salt
description: RED ROCK DELI CROSTINI CRACKERS:SMOKED SALT:.:115 GRAM
long_description:
A New Approach to a Classic Taste
Red Rock Deli Crostini Cracker Biscuits Share Pack Smoked Salt 115g creates a new twist on the classic salt seasoning of biscuit crackers by smoking its salt. This preparation method deepens the overall flavour of our snack crackers, leaving a smokey aftertaste that is hard to forget. Indulge in something new by popping open this share pack today.

Entertain Guests & Tastebuds Alike
Entertainment just got easy with Red Rock Deli Style Crackers. We use crostini crackers as the base for our smoked salt seasoning, creating a sturdy foundation worthy of matching your platter toppings of choice. Any gathering with friends and family, whether it's a sophisticated dinner party or casual meet-up on a weekend, is improved when you add these cheese and dip crackers.

Lunchtime Luxury
Switch things up next time lunch rolls around by incorporating Red Rock Deli Style Crostini Cracker Biscuits. The 115g share pack means there's more than enough to portion out across the week and amongst the family. Pair it with your favourite cheese and/or dip, or keep it as is to taste the full scope of smoked salt. No matter how you plate it up, this is a lunch snack that makes eating more luxurious than ever.
  • A platter share pack that any gathering is sure to celebrate the inclusion of. Your cheese platter isn't complete without the addition of crostini crackers like these. Whether you're heading to a dinner party, a picnic, or staying at home with friends, this crispbread can fit the snacking occasion. 115 grams of smoked salt sensations that everyone's sure to love.

At OB Finest, we believe in quality without compromise, offering entertainers a refined, sophisticated touch that will please any connoisseur. Crackers Like You Never Tasted Red Rock Deli

Sea Salt & Balsamic Deli Style Biscuit Crackers offer a whole new perspective on the snack game through their high quality ingredients and delicate seasonings. Few things say uniqueness quite like these deli-style crackers. So, give yourself a taste of luxury with Red Rock Deli crackers today and entertain your senses.

A Multipack Snack For All

Share the savoury sensation with friends, family, and loved ones alike with this 5 pack multipack. Entertainment has never been so easy to secure, nor easy to dish out with these shareable pockets of flavour. Dinner at home with friends no longer means fighting after the last biscuit or cracker when each participant has their own serving.

Feed Your Inner Foodie

You'll never hesitate to reveal your true foodie colours once you get a chance to crunch into these sea salt and balsamic vinegar crackers. No other biscuit brand will come close to comparing to the deli-style crackers Red Rock Deli is known for, so be sure to pick out perfection next time you go food shopping. The other foodies in your life are sure to be ecstatic when you stock up on these snacks.

  • Your next dinner at home with friends will be a spectacle when you place Red Rock Deli crackers onto your cheese platter.

Alternatively, you can enjoy our wholegrain crackers on their own and delve head-first into the taste of onion and balsamic vinegar. Regardless of how you plate it up, Sunbites will always be a hit!Love Lunch AgainNeed a new snack to replace the same old options come lunch time? Looking to shake things up and make opening lunch boxes exciting once more? Sunbites snack crackers are sure to be a hit, especially when you combine them with lunch meats or cheeses. name: Deli Honey Soy Chicken Deli Style Crackers
description: RED ROCK DELI HONEY SOY CHICKEN DELI STYLE CRACKERS SHARE PACK:.:135 GRAM.
long_description:
A Flavour Combination That'll Make Even the Foodies Drool
Red Rock Deli Honey Soy Chicken Deli Style Crackers are made in Australia, using only the finest quality ingredients. Each deli-style cracker is loaded with the sweet liveliness of honey and saltiness from soy sauce. Baked to perfection, our premium biscuits are light and crispy. Savour the flavour of our generously seasoned deli-inspired combinations with friends; there's more than enough to go around in our 135g share pack.

Platter Worthy Perfection
Our honey soy chicken cracker biscuits are the perfect snack for your next cheese platter, picnic, or dinner party. Bring your mates around for the ultimate accompaniment to any dips, meat and cheese with these platter crackers.
Indulge in the taste of Red Rock Deli Honey Soy Chicken Deli Style Crackers, suitable for even the fussiest of eaters.

Gourmet Crackers for Wholesome Entertaining
Red Rock Deli Crackers are deliciously seasoned with exquisite flavour combinations, delectable enough to get any of your friends raving when they get a taste. The biscuit crackers are baked, not fried, for our iconic crunch and mouth feel that is as delicate as a butterfly's wing. On top of that, these biscuits are made with natural flavours and colours, making them the perfect choice for some wholesome entertainment.
  • Natural Australian-made baked biscuit crackers that are perfect for entertaining. Your new go-to savoury lunch snacks, seasoned with a harmonious blend of sweet and salty flavours. Baked biscuits like you never tasted before, with each share pack containing natural flavours and colours. Our crackers are baked not fried, meaning they are the perfect crunchy snack to indulge in after a hard day's work. The perfect platter crackers for when you're entertaining friends and family to round off that cheese board at the next dinner party.

name: Cheddar & Parmesan Deli Style Crackers
description: RED ROCK DELI CHEDDAR & PARMESAN STYLE CRACKERS SHARE PACK:.:135 GRAM
long_description:
A Perfect Harmony of Bold Natural Flavours
Red Rock Deli Cheddar & Parmesan Deli Style Crackers are Australian-made, using only the most exceptional ingredients. Each of our Red Rock deli crackers are generously seasoned. Taste the notes of cheddar and parmesan with each bite.

The Final Touch to Your Cheese Platter
These baked snacks are like crackers you never tasted before. They are the perfect crackers for cheese, cold cuts and dips. Try them with your next cheese platter or make them the hero of your next dinner party with your friends and other foodies! It's sure to spark curiosity amongst your guests!

The Ideal Snack to Pair with Entertainment
Experience Red Rock Deli Cheddar & Parmesan Deli Style Crackers in the comfort of your own home. Whether you're parked in front of the TV with your favourite cooking show switched on, or having dinner at home with friends; you will want to try our wholesome, baked crackers.

Red Rock Deli Cheddar and Parmesan Crackers are:
- Perfectly seasoned, experience flavour with each bite
- Baked not fried for the ultimate feel good snack
- Delightfully crisp and light to deliver a unique taste sensation
- Made with natural colours and flavours
- An essential snack cracker for your next dinner party or entertainment event

Feed your curiosity.
  • A deliciously low calorie, Australian made snack.

  • Indulge in our better for you crackers with less guilt. They're made exclusively from natural colours and flavours.

  • Thin and crispy with a luscious crunch, they provide the perfect flavour base to any of your favourite cheeses. Get them onto your next cheese platter to keep your guests nibbling away.

  • Provides great variety for entertaining at your next dinner party or for your next picnic on the green with family.

  • Suitable for any occasion, any time, anywhere.

If you're looking for the perfect snack to eat on it's own, top your Charcuterie board or pair with your favourite cheese, dip, or entertaining with family & friends, and want a platter that will steal the show, Ritz is your perfect accompaniment. It's the biscuit that can do it all! Top your cheeseboard with crackers, dips, slices of your tastiest block & soft cheeses, and a pop of fresh with fruit and vegetables and you'll have everyone covered. If you are feeling fancy, you can also create the perfect finger food for your party with Ritz cracker appetisers. Or if you'd like, eat straight from the packet!

Quality is our aim at Red Rock Deli, which is why our Gourmet Crackers range is so popular with everyone.

name: Multipack Bluey Pizza Cracker
description: ARNOTTS MULTIPACK BLUEY PIZZA CRACKER 168G
long_description:
It's nothing but fun and games with Arnott's Bluey biscuits!
An exciting snack that will go down a treat with the bonus of no artificial colours, flavours, and preservatives. Perfect for a lunchbox addition or for on-the-go!

Bluey Pairs Game
Hey, kiddos. Grab a mate and get ready to play!

How to Play
1. Ask a grown-up to help you cut out the cards along the dashed lines.
2. Spread out the card face down on a flat surface.
3. Take turns flipping over two cards at a time. If the cards have the same picture, they are yours and you get another turn. If they don't match, turn them back over (but remember where they are!).
4. Take turns until there are no cards left. If you have the most pairs at the end, you win. Hooray!
  • - Contains 8 snack packs of Bluey Pizza biscuits

  • - All the wackadoo fun of an episode of Bluey in biscuit form!

  • - Perfect as lunchbox snacks

  • - Bluey Pairs Game on the pack

  • - Impressive Health Star Rating (HSR) of 4 & no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

The Good Stuff:

  • Gluten free
  • Suitable for vegans
  • Made from wholegrain brown, red and black rice
  • Never baked or fried
  • Lunchbox friendly and portion controlled

Light and crunchy, Table Of Plenty Popped Rice Cakes Salt & Vinegar Multipack 6 Pack combines the wholesome goodness of brown, red and black rice with a tangy salt and vinegar flavour. Air popped -never baked or fried- these gluten free mini rice cakes deliver a lighter crunch that both kids and parents can enjoy as part of everyday snacking.


Perfect for school lunches, after-school snacks or a quick bite on the go, these portion-controlled packs are designed with convenience in mind. Vegan friendly and made from wholegrain rice, they are a versatile option for families looking for savoury snacks that balance flavour with simple ingredients.


These multipacks fit naturally within healthy snacks, school lunch and lunchbox ranges, while also offering a tasty savoury alternative to traditional biscuits and crackers.

A little tang with a lot of wholegrain goodness. Table of Plenty Salt & Vinegar Mini Rice Cakes Multipack makes snacking light, fun and convenient.

Arnott's Shapes Originals Variety 15 Multipack Biscuits
Enjoy the ultimate snack experience with Arnott's Shapes Originals Variety 15 Multipack Biscuits! Each pack is portioned just for you, offering a savoury snack bursting with bold flavours that everyone will love.

These cracker chips are made with no artificial colours or preservatives, so you can enjoy their deliciousness guilt-free. With loads of flavour you can see, Arnott's Shapes are a must-have for any snack lover. The assorted pack features Aussie favourite savoury biscuit flavours, including Barbecue, Pizza, and Mini Chicken Crimpy - each one packed with bags of flavour!

Whether you're looking for a quick snack, a tasty addition to your lunch box, or a savoury treat to share, Arnott's Shapes Originals Variety 15 Multipack Biscuits are the perfect choice. Stock up on this multipack today and satisfy your cravings with every bite!

Crisp and light,

Table Of Plenty Mini Rice Cakes Mixed Berry Yoghurt Topped Share Pack

combines crunchy wholegrain rice with a smooth yoghurt berry layer for a deliciously balanced sweet snack. Made in Australia, these bite-sized treats deliver the perfect mix of wholesome goodness and indulgence, offering a lighter alternative to everyday biscuits and crackers.

Fructose friendly and suitable for vegetarians, they are a versatile choice for families looking for simple, satisfying options. Perfect for enjoying on the go, sharing as part of a family pack, or keeping in the pantry for an afternoon pick-me-up, these mini rice cakes fit seamlessly into a variety of snacking occasions.


A little indulgence with a lot of wholegrain goodness. Table of Plenty Mixed Berry Yoghurt Mini Rice Cakes Share Pack makes snacking light, fruity and satisfying.

  • Made from wholegrain brown, red and black rice

Light and crunchy, Table Of Plenty Popped Mini Rice Cakes Cheddar Cheese Share Pack delivers tasty cheddar cheese flavour in bite-sized form. Made from air-popped brown, red and black rice, these gluten free mini rice cakes are never baked or fried, giving them a wholesome crunch that kids and families can enjoy any time.


Perfect for lunchboxes, after-school snacks, or sharing straight from the pack, they are a fun and convenient choice for every snacking occasion. Wholegrain goodness and vegetarian friendly credentials make them a versatile option for households looking for lighter savoury snacks without compromise.


These mini rice cakes fit naturally within healthy snacks, school lunch and lunchbox ranges, while also offering a satisfying alternative to traditional biscuits and crackers.

name: Share Topped Mini Rice Cakes Chocolate
description: TABLE OF PLENTY SHARE TOPPED MINI RICE CAKES 60G:CHOCOLATE:.:60 GRAM
long_description:
The Good Stuff:

  • Gluten free
  • Suitable for vegetarians
  • Made from wholegrain rice
  • Fructose friendly
  • Only 17 calories per cake
  • Ideal for school lunch, lunchbox snacks, or sharing
  • Made in Australia

Crisp and light, Table Of Plenty Mini Rice Cakes Milk Chocolate Topped Share Pack combines crunchy wholegrain rice with smooth milk chocolate for a deliciously balanced snack. These bite-sized treats are made in Australia and deliver the perfect mix of wholesome goodness and sweet indulgence, offering a lighter alternative to everyday biscuits and crackers.


At only 17 calories per cake, they are the ideal gluten free snack for kids snacks, school lunches or lunch boxes. Fructose friendly and suitable for vegetarians, they are a versatile choice for families looking for simple, feel-good options. Perfect for enjoying on the go, sharing as part of a family pack, or keeping at work for an afternoon pick-me-up, these mini rice cakes fit seamlessly into healthy snacking occasions.


A little indulgence with a lot of wholegrain goodness. Table of Plenty Milk Chocolate Mini Rice Cakes Share Pack makes snacking simple, satisfying and wholesome.

name: Rice Cracker Chicken
description: SAKATA RICE CRACKERS:CHICKEN:.:90 GRAM
long_description:
High in Flavour For Snacking Needs
If you want chicken rice crackers without the possibility of overindulgence, Sakata Rice Cracker Biscuits Snack Pack Chicken 90g is the option for you. Each rice biscuit is light in texture, but still retains the full-bodied richness of chicken due to its carefully created seasoning. These gluten-free rice crackers are sure to make an impression within the first bite.

A Convenient Treat to Cap Off the Day
When it comes to the end of a long day out, a snack is sometimes all you need to cap it with genuine contentment. If you're entertaining guests or looking to chill out on the couch with family, this snack pack of chicken biscuits is ready to offer savoury relief. End the day off on a high note by including Sakata crackers in your snacks of choice.

Platter Up at a Dinner Party With Sakata
Next time you head out to a dinner party, or choose to host dinner at home with friends, kick off the night by offering Sakata rice crackers to the gathering. No night starts off on the right note if there isn't a range of cheese and cracker snacks to enjoy. Luckily, the Sakata cracker variety always pairs well with any toppings of choice, especially the chicken crackers. So, dig in with Sakata today and platter up snack perfection.
  • Sakata Rice Cracker Biscuits Snack Pack Chicken 90g brings the taste of succulent chicken to the Sakata crackers range.

  • These chicken rice crackers stand out amongst other cracker options with their full-bodied flavour and delightful crunch.

  • A convenient treat you'll look forward to at the end of the day.

  • Sakata offers gluten-free crackers full of flavour.

  • Gluten free

Crisp and light, Table Of Plenty Mini Rice Cakes Dark Chocolate Topped Family Pack combines crunchy wholegrain rice with smooth dark chocolate for a deliciously balanced snack. These bite-sized treats are a wholesome alternative to everyday biscuits and crackers, offering the perfect mix of healthy snacking and indulgence.


At only 17 calories per cake, they are the ideal gluten free snack for kids snacks, school lunches or lunch boxes. They are also perfect for on-the-go moments, keeping in the pantry for family snacking, or enjoying at work as a smarter alternative to biscuits and rice crackers.

name: Share Topped Mini Rice Cakes Dark Chocolate
description: TABLE OF PLENTY SHARE TOPPED MINI RICE CAKES:DARK CHOCOLATE:.:60 GRAM
long_description:
The Good Stuff:

  • Gluten free
  • Suitable for vegetarians
  • Made from wholegrain rice
  • Fructose friendly
  • Only 17 calories per cake
  • Ideal for school lunch, lunchbox snacks, or sharing
  • Made in Australia

Crisp and light, Table Of Plenty Mini Rice Cakes Dark Chocolate Topped Share Pack delivers crunchy rice cakes topped with smooth dark chocolate for a delicious balance of wholesome and indulgent. Made in Australia, these bite-sized snacks are crafted from wholegrain rice, offering a smarter alternative to everyday biscuits and crackers.


At only 17 calories per cake, they are the ideal gluten free snack for kids snacks, school lunches or tucked into a lunch box. Fructose friendly and suitable for vegetarians, they are a versatile choice for families seeking simple, satisfying options. Perfect for on-the-go moments, sharing as part of a family pack, or keeping in the pantry for an afternoon pick-me-up, these mini rice cakes fit seamlessly into everyday snacking occasions.


A little indulgence with a lot of wholegrain goodness. Table of Plenty Dark Chocolate Mini Rice Cakes Share Pack makes snacking crisp, light and satisfying.

Such a convenient snack is the perfect addition of delight to your lunch snacks during a work break, or as a surprise treat late at night. No matter the occasion, the innate deliciousness of gluten-free rice crackers will be evident in every bite.

A Daily Highlight of the Snack Variety
If you're looking for lunchbox snacks that will make your daily break a better experience than ever, consider Sakata barbeque rice crackers. These BBQ biscuits work with a variety of toppings, whether it comes as cheese or in the form of dips. Make lunch the highlight of their day by providing these rice crackers with dip or cheese of your choice.

Keep It Simple, Sakata!
Sakata Rice Cracker Biscuits Snack Pack Sour Cream & Chives 90g keeps snack time simple yet scrumptious by offering gluten-free crackers coated in the taste of sour cream and chives. This classic flavour takes on a whole new life when attached to rice crackers, while still retaining the simple joy of a cracker that can be paired well with any toppings of choice. Grow Your Rice Crackers Collection
The Sakata cracker variety boasts multiple types of biscuits for your tastebuds to explore, so be sure to include sour cream and chives rice crackers on your growing list of tried and true lunch snacks. Multiple occasions call for the easy preparation of snacks, so stay ahead of the game by expanding your rice cracker collection with sour cream crackers!

Couch Crackers
Sometimes a day calls for a comfortable lie about on the couch when the daily tasks and responsibilities are done. Sakata crackers whole-heartedly support relaxation when it's needed, which is why their sour cream and chives rice crackers are perfect to casually share on the couch. Whether you're watching a movie with family or catching up over coffee with friends, Sakata biscuits are here for you.
  • Sakata Rice Cracker Biscuits Snack Pack Sour Cream & Chives 90g are never unsavoury in taste or crunch value.

  • Keep snack time simple with a snack pack of sour cream and chives rice crackers.

  • A gluten-free cracker that pairs well with your favourite topping or dip.

  • Always ready to be shared and enjoyed with loved ones.

name: Rice Crackers Wholegrain
description: SAKATA RICE CRACKERS:WHOLEGRAIN:.:80 GRAM
long_description:
A Wholesome Snack of Wholegrain
Sakata Wholegrain Rice Crackers Snack Pack Original 80g introduces the taste and goodness of wholegrain to the Sakata crackers range, bringing you a snack unlike any other. Snacking has never been so easy with these ready-made crackers. Particularly since the original flavouring of these savoury biscuits stands as an example of the continued excellence of the Sakata cracker variety. Entrust your tastebuds to gluten-free rice crackers you know and love to provide a wholesome snack.

Best Served Topped
While the original taste of these Sakata rice crackers stands out in their notoriety, any cracker is best served with a topping of choice. Whether you're looking into crackers for cheese or those that pair well as crackers with dip, Sakata wholegrain crackers will always serve you well! So, get creative at the next dinner party and find your perfect topping and cracker biscuits combination.

Fall in Love With Lunchtime Once More
Lunch snacks should always be a bright spot in the day to look forward to. If you need a treat to add to lunchbox snacks or to enjoy during the work break, then try out Sakata original crackers. With 80g in each pack, there's more than enough to go around! Make preparing for back to school or to work an easy shop by adding Sakata original crackers to the list.
  • Sakata Wholegrain Rice Crackers Snack Pack Original 80g proves that 'original' always remains beloved by the audience.

  • Try out wholegrain crackers for a more wholesome snack in your day.

  • Make your lunchbox a bright spot in the day by including original wholegrain crackers.

  • Plain crackers that pair perfectly with your preferred toppings.

  • Gluten Free

  • 101 Calories Per Serve.

  • Baked Not Fried.

  • Health Star Rating 4.

Unwrap the wildlife-themed Gumi Yum Surprise for a wild adventure in every bite! Each treat bursts with delicious flavour, featuring eight fruity favourites: Cherry, Strawberry, Orange, Pineapple, Lemon, Green Apple, Blue Raspberry, and Grape. Inside, discover one of 27 collectable wildlife toys—each with a unique accessory to spark creativity, including the ultra-rare golden lion! Gluten-free, dairy-free, and nut-free, Gumi Yum is a safe and tasty treat for everyone. Perfect for stockings or festive surprises, it's the ultimate blend of flavour, fun, and holiday magic!

  • Exclusive Accessory - Every toy comes with its own fun accessory to inspire imaginative play.

long_description:

name: Watermelon Burst Sugar Free Gum 12 Piece
description: 5 GUM WATERMELON BURST SUGAR FREE GUM 12PC 32G
long_description:
It's not when you take the stage, it's the five seconds before. So grab a stick of 5 GUM WATERMELON BURST Sugarfree Chewing Gum and harness that adrenaline. Experience the exhilarating upfront burst of juicy watermelon that's as sweet as summer, followed by a long-lasting fruit gum flavour that only 5 GUM Chewing Gum delivers. With 12 pieces in this 5 GUM pack, there's enough breath freshening chewing gum to share with mates, so you take on more life together. Best of all, 5 GUM is a sugarless gum! From tense gaming sessions with your mates to crashing the skate park with your crew, life happens in 5. So grab a stick of 5 GUM WATERMELON BURST Chewing Gum and show them what you can do.
Includes a 32g 12 Piece Pack of 5 GUM WATERMELON BURST Sugarfree Chewing Gum.
  • Freshen breath and stimulate your adventurous side with 5 Gum.

  • Contains 12 pieces of juicy Watermelon flavoured chewing gum.

  • Chewing sugarfree gum, like 5, is proven to benefit dental health, as it helps neutralise plaque acids.

  • 5 Gum Sugarfree Chewing Gum.

name: Liquid Centres Lemon & Lime
description: SOOTHERS LIQUID CENTRES:LEMONLIME:.:10 PACK
long_description:
Whether you're dealing with a scratchy throat or stuffy nose, you can count on Soothers to be your trusty companion. These lozenges are formulated with active ingredients like Menthol and Eucalyptus Oil, which give a cooling sensation and help ease throat discomfort. Plus, they're made with Vitamin C. And the best part? They have a Lemon & Lime taste that oozes flavour in the centre, giving a refreshing twist that makes them enjoyable to take. The compact size allows you to carry it in your pocket or bag, so you will always have one when you need it. Soothe on-the-go with delicious lozenges.     
  • Delicious lemon & lime liquid centre

  • Convenient on-the-go pack

  • No artificial colours

  • Made in Australia

These little helpers are made to soothe those annoying symptoms like dry throats and stuffy noses. These lozenges are super convenient for when you're on the go or too busy to slow down, making it easy to take them with you wherever you go.

name: Chewy Heartburn & Acid Indigestion Peppermint Flavour Tablets
description: CHEWY QUICK-EZE HEARTBURN & ACID INDIGESTION PEPPERMINT FLAVOUR TABLETS 1 PACK
long_description:
Are you experiencing that unpleasant burning feeling in the back of your throat? Well, you might be dealing with heartburn. But don't worry, we've got a quick relief for that - Quick Eze Peppermint Chewy! This reliable antacid is made with calcium carbonate, an active ingredient that neutralizes excess stomach acid and eases your discomfort, so that you can get on with your day or night. Not only does it work fast, but it also has a delicious peppermint flavour that leaves your mouth feeling refreshed. Its small pack size allows you to carry it in a pocket or bag so you will always have one at your fingertips when you need it. Don't let heartburn or indigestion slow you down - grab Quick Eze Peppermint Chewy for fast-acting relief and a delightful taste and satisfying chewy texture.
  • Rapid heartburn & indigestion relief

  • Great peppermint taste

  • Convenient on-the-go pack

  • No artificial colours

  • Made in Australia

Every bag of SKITTLES Fruits Lollies is filled with classic bite-sized chewy lollies in a rainbow of fruity flavours, including strawberry, orange, grape, lemon and green apple. name: Layers.
description: SOUR PATCH KIDS LAYERZ 190G.
long_description:
What's Sour then Sweet but always delicious? You already know: SOUR PATCH KIDS lollies! Disrupt your tastebuds on a sour then sweet journey with a creamy twist, Sour Patch Kids LAYERS! A delicious mix of delicious Sour Patch Kids jellies with a soft and creamy flavoured layer, covered in a sour then sweet blast.   • No artificial colours or flavours

  • Perfect for sharing a little sweet mischief, at candy-crucial gatherings, for Halloween, birthday parties, celebrations and special occasions.

  • Keep everyone satisfied when you bring all your NEW favourite KIDS to the party!

  • Aussie Made

description: THE NATURAL CONFECTIONERY CO. VEGAN FRUIT FLAVOURED JELLIES LOLLIES 180G
long_description:
Our yummy The Natural Confectionery Co. Vegan Fruity Flavoured lollies are made with no artificial colours, no artificial flavours, no artificial sweeteners, no GMOs and no high fructose corn syrup, but are jam packed with deliciousness.

These Vegan, Vegetarian and Flexitarian-friendly jelly treats are made with a gelatine free recipe. With an array of fruit shaped, mouth-watering fruity flavoured candy including Crisp Apple, Wild Blackcurrant, Luscious Peach, Tropical Pineapple and Ripe Raspberry. They're YUM FOR EVERYONE! Real good lollies #gowiththereal

Contains Wheat.
  • Yummy vegan friendly, fruit flavoured jelly lollies in fun fruit shapes

  • Gelatine free recipe ideal for a vegan, vegetarian and flexitarian treat or snack

  • Perfect for parties and lolly bowls

name: Sours Cloudz Chewy Lollies

long_description:
SQUISH THE RAINBOW, TANG THE RAINBOW, TASTE THE RAINBOW! If you like SKITTLES sours, you'll love SKITTLES CLOUDZ sours, a unique new lolly with an awesome squishy, airy and bouncy texture, bursting with the fruity flavours of the rainbow, including sour pineapple, sour raspberry, sour mandarin and sour cherry. This SKITTLES pouch is a chance to share all of that sweetness with friends, family, or coworkers. Take SKITTLES CLOUDZ Fruits lollies to go, or stock your home or office sweets bowl with a sweet treat that everyone will love. They're also perfect for birthday parties, nights in with friends, or Halloween treats.
  • Includes an awesome 120g bag of SKITTLES Cloudz Sours Lollies.

  • A bite-sized chewy lolly with a colourful crispy shell.

  • Flavours include sour pineapple, sour raspberry, sour mandarin and sour cherry flavours

  • Perfect for parties, picnics, movie nights, game-time snacks and more!

  • 3 x roll value pack format

Mentos Fruit, the perfect candy for those who love a burst of fruity flavour! Each pack contains 37.5g of chewy goodness, with a variety of fruit flavors including strawberry, orange, and lemon. name: Kids Berry Lollies
description: SOUR PATCH KIDS BERRY LOLLIES 190G
long_description:
What's Sour then Sweet but always delicious? You already know: SOUR PATCH KIDS lollies!

Flood your mouth with delicious Berry flavoured lollies covered in a sour then sweet blast! SOUR PATCH KIDS lollies are fun, soft, and chewy treats; beloved by kids, teenagers, and adults.

Our awesome Berry flavours include Strawberry, Blackcurrant & Blue Raspberry.

Candy with no artificial colours or flavours.
  • Delicious berry flavoured lollies covered in a sour then sweet blast!

  • Perfect for sharing a little sweet mischief, at candy-crucial gatherings, for Halloween and special occasions.

  • Keep everyone satisfied when you bring all your favourite Kids to the party!

name: Juicy Bursts Orange & Passionfruit Flavoured Lollies
description: THE NATURAL CONFECTIONERY CO. JUICY BURSTS ORANGE & PASSIONFRUIT FLAVOURED LOLLIES 150G
long_description:
The Natural Confectionery Co. Juicy Bursts are bursting with fruity flavour! A delicious mix of Orange and Passionfruit flavoured jellies oozing with deliciousness as you bite into the luscious soft centre packed with an intense punch of sweet, tangy fruity flavour. Juicy Bursts contain fruit juice concentrate and deliver a mouthwatering burst of flavour in every piece.
These jellies are Aussie Made with no artificial colours, no artificial flavours, and no artificial sweeteners.
Taste the burst of our yummy Juicy Bursts lollies in irresistible Orange & Passionfruit Flavours today!
Real good lollies #gowiththereal
  • Delicious centre-filled lollies, bursting with tropical-licious fruity flavour in Orange & Passionfruit

  • Contains fruit juice concentrate

  • A great treat to satisfy those sweet cravings or share with family and friends at home, or on the go for camping and road trips

  • Perfect lollies for birthday parties, celebrations, BBQs, move nights, lolly bowls, Halloween or an anytime snack

  • Aussie Made

50% LESS SUGAR* NEVER TASTED BETTER

Real good lollies #gowiththereal #thenaturalconfectioneryco

name: Multipack Mint
description: MENTOS MULTIPACK:MINT:.:112 GRAM
long_description:
Looking for a delicious and refreshing candy that you can enjoy anytime? Look no further than Mentos Candy Mint Roll 3 x Value Pack Chewy Dragees! With its unique texture and cool, minty flavor, this candy is the perfect treat for anyone who loves fresh breath and great taste.

Each value pack contains three rolls of chewy dragees, giving you a total of 112.5g of candy. The roll format makes it easy to share with friends or enjoy on your own, while the resealable packaging ensures your candy stays fresh and delicious.

Mentos Candy Mint Roll features a sugar shell and chewy center, providing a satisfying texture and long-lasting flavor. And with its refreshing mint taste, it's the perfect way to freshen up your breath after a meal or whenever you need a little pick-me-up.

So why settle for boring candy when you can have Mentos Candy Mint Roll? Try it today and experience the perfect combination of great taste and fresh breath.
  • A refreshing chewy dragee with a crunchy outside and a chewy inside

  • Chewy mint flavoured sweet

  • Chewy mint flavoured confectionery

  • Convenient Pack - Rolls are perfect for your pocket, bag, car, on the go

  • 3 x roll value pack format

- Sulphite Free

name: Crunchy Canadian Maple Syrup 6 Twin Bars
description: NATURE VALLEY CRUNCHY BARS 252G:CANADIAN MAPLE SYRUP:.:252 GRAM
long_description:
We believe in the power of nature.

It can inspire the get-up-and-go in each of us and means we're able to make stuff that tastes really good too. So whether it's busy mornings or just needing a little pick-me-up, let the great taste of our ingredients like oats and Canadian maple syrup give you everything to take it on the Nature Valley way.

Packed with whole grain oats and a dash of Canadian maple syrup, Nature Valley CRUNCHY GRANOLA CANADIAN MAPLE SYRUP bars are the perfect on-the-go snack, there for you whenever you need it most. Nature's pretty generous too, that's why we've packed our packs with two delicious bars to make the most of your day.

  • 100% whole grain oats

  • No artificial colours

  • No preservatives

  • Lactose free

long_description:

So whether it's busy mornings or just needing a little pick-me-up, let the great taste of our ingredients like Peanut & Chocolate, give you everything to take it on the Nature Valley way.

Nature Valley Protein Peanut & Chocolate bar contains crunchy peanuts, tempting chocolate pieces and luscious peanut butter. And with 20% of your daily protein needs, it's the perfect on-the-go snack for busy mornings or when you need a little pick-me-up. 

  • High in protein and high in fibre

  • No colours or preservatives

  • No artificial flavours

  • Suitable for vegetarians

Protein to help satisfy your hunger!* This UNCLE TOBYS protein muesli bar is made up of delicious raspberry fruity pieces, goji berries, and a white choc drizzle! Our bars are made right here in Australia with 100% Aussie Oats and a plant-based protein to help you feel fuller*. This Raspberry, Goji & White Choc protein muesli bar has a 4 Health Star Rating. *As part of a healthy varied diet 7g protein per bar
  • 100% Australian-grown whole grain oats

  • 20% protein per bar*

  • Perfect for Lunchboxes & On-the-go

Mayver's new range of Low Carb High Protein bars are 100% natural, 5 Health Star Rated & made with delicious flavours to excite your taste buds and curb those sugar cravings.

Made with 65%^ less carbs, 50%^ less sugar and 126%^ more protein, than other readily available low carb bars, they are the better choice for you & your family to enjoy!

Our Salted Caramel bars are made with a soft chocolate brownie protein base, gooey chocolate fudge layer and covered in delicious milk choc with protein crisps. You're going to LOVE them!

name: Yoghurt Variety Muesli Bars Value Pack School Lunchbox Snacks
description: UNCLE TOBYS MUESLI BARS YOGHURT VARIETY FAMILY VALUE LUNCHBOX SNACKS
long_description:
Discover the oaty goodness of an UNCLE TOBYS Muesli Bar! UNCLE TOBYS Yoghurt Muesli Bars have a creamy yoghurt flavour and are a delicious lunchbox friendly or on-the-go snack. Containing no artificial colours or flavours, our bars are packed with 100% Australian-grown whole grain oats sourced from Australian farmers. They also have a 4 out of 5 Health Star Rating. As a source of fibre and wholesome energy, an UNCLE TOBYS muesli bar is simple goodness for helping you get stuck into what matters. In other words, all the good stuff in life.
  • 100% Australian-grown whole grain oats

  • No Artificial Colours or Flavours

  • Perfect for Lunchboxes & On-the-go

  • 4 Health Star Rating
